analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with incomplete black hole themed content. The current state shows partial implementation of black hole animations, cosmic themes, and interactive elements. The test-website version has the most comprehensive setup with CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files that need completion for the black hole theme.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML structure with black hole themed sections including animated slides, cosmic visuals, and interactive elements for black hole education content.
Implement full dark cosmic theme with black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and smooth transitions for all interactive components.
Complete all JavaScript functionality including slide show controls, mobile menu toggle, black hole quiz, and interactive animations for cosmic elements.
